enum Widget {
    Text { content: String },
    Image { path: String },
}

impl Widget {
    fn render(&self) -> String {
        match self {
            Widget::Text { content } => content.clone(),
            Widget::Image { path } => format!("<img src=\"{}\">", path),
        }
    }
}

// GOOD: enum dispatch avoids pointer chasing and vtable overhead
fn render_all(widgets: &[Widget]) -> String {
    widgets.iter().map(|w| w.render()).collect()
}
